Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Rosener Family Trust, et al., Kinko's Inc., and Clarence Krieger, et al, Motion to Remove Case Nos. 402623, 409134 409320 from Arbitration, joinder in Motion of defendants Barry I. Gruber, Carol A. Gruber and Anthony Theophilos Case Nos. 410361 and 411232 are scheduled this day. There being no apperance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Cases are ordered removed from Arbitration. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court on its own motion ordered all eleven consolidated cases removed form Arbitration and a Jury Trial Date of 8/25/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206, is ordered set. Court to give notice of Trial Dates and Mandatory Settlement Conferences in all cases. Cases to be referred to the SF Bar Early Settlement Conference Program. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.
